reviews.review_msg:
This class was an absolute waste of time and money, we sat in a room and did nothing but discuss pointless group goals with each other. It baffles me that a university would charge money for this class.

It's easy if that's what you're looking for but you will learn nothing. A complete waste of time.
Easy class, but you have to attend every single lecture. Professor can be arrogant and says whatever is on his mind, even if it isn't appropriate.

BUS681 MBA class is excellent. After 32 years my advice is listen carefully high school & university students. What he teaches is real life. You may not see the value in it now but you will wish you paid attention when you are IN business & bump up against conflict, politics, HR issues or understanding why your business is not lit up.

Class wasn't hard at all, grade is comprised of 2 reflection papers (25% each), a take home final (30%), and participation (20%). If you go to lectures and can apply basic self reflection in your papers, you will do great in this course! Not necessarily fond of Gervase as a person (somewhat arrogant), but easy course nonetheless.

Draining+exhausting class. Unclear grading criteria, unhelpful prof, extremely rude feedback on assignments, be prepared to be spending 10+ hours PER week on this class. You won't understand what's expected of you - he'll tell you to figure it out on your own. This class DOES prepare you to be a consultant ... at the cost of your mental health.

Gervase challenges his students to think in ways most of them never have. Naturally some resist, because this instructor pushes them to speak with clarity about their emotions and thoughts. This is really difficult for a lot of people, but Gervase teaches the skills needed to do it. Really enjoyed this course and recommend his classes to anyone.
No Comments

He reminds me of what would happen if a hippie decided to become a teacher one day. There was no organization, no structure and no use for anything he taught... ie: How to take notes the Gervase Bushe method... I didn't pay to learn how to take notes!
Awesome prof: visionary. He has clear points to make, well recognized professional. His teaching could open up your mind if you try to understand and apply it. Up to you to try - it's your life!

During 488 Gervase really makes you look at yourself and your behaviours. He gives great feedback and I use the skills that I learnt from him everyday. You need to go into this class with an open mind and you will grow as a student and as a person.

The worse prof I have ever had.  Useless coure. learn nothing . stupid and unuseful material. purely waste of money... terrible , horrible .. do not take 487 with him. totally a bs prof.. the worse prof in sfu..he expect u to be a mba student who come out with some paper that is related to work experience and self point of view.too hard to bba's..

Please quit. This course is useless. You will learn nothing, I mean NOTHING, from this guy. It is a total waste of tuition. The course is useless, the text is useless, his materials are useless..... this list will go endless. Dont take any class with him!
I'm sorry some people are just not cut out of teaching. Prof Busche is one of them. This class was terrible and a total waste of money. I don't recommend it to anyone if he's teaching it!!!
Don't have to go to lecture...just look at power point slides and textbook will be sufficient to get a good mark on test...
lectures are very interesting... if you follow. Paper is challenging as its requirements are vague. But depend on who you have as a TA.
Four tests (15%), one paper(%40)...10% show up to lectures

Unless you have an undying passion for org theory, this class is zzzzzzz....but good thing is that you can zzzzzzz.  Just memorize all the words on the powerpoint slides and A+ it like me.  I'm still wondering how I did it!
He knows the stuff very well. But quizes are not easy. In 1st quiz, he will ask what he said in the lecture. Quizes are quite tricky.
Lecture is totally non related to midterms!!!

Interesting subject(if like HR and org theory).Lectures are almost too informative.Although grading format is simple, you need to learn everything and in detail.A challenge. Reading (book/ppt), studying is not optional.Paper is super hard.
His exam are crazy, his ppt notes are useless. Paper are really really unfiar because of ther marker AVOID HIM !!!!!!!
The quizz is very hard.Unreasonable expectation.

The most useless and boring lectures EVER! Don't even attend it. Study all the text and PPT slides for the quizes and it will be easy like hell. Then some good writing in your case study should give you an A range.
Easy quizzes, no final. Study the LECTURE NOTES!!
No Comments
EASY!!  Lectures are useless, quizzes are easy, paper is easy.  What more can you ask for?
No Comments

No Comments
Study those pwt notes! Lectures are optional (aka skipable)
Good course, weird, but good...
even geeks are skipping
the only way you can fail the exams is skipping them
I think this course is easy interms of it's structure(no finals), but is useful
Useless lectures, most people didn't even show up. Bad TA. Super easy.
